items.name: Kkot Galbisal
items.description: Premium boneless short rib, prized for its fine marbling and naturally rich flavor. Grilled quickly over high heat, the meat stays tender and juicy, releasing a deep beef aroma with every bite. A true favorite for those who appreciate the pure taste of top-quality beef
items.simplified_description: High-quality boneless short rib, grilled to perfection, tender and juicy

items.name: Kkot Deungsim
items.description: Prime ribeye cap, renowned for its exceptional marbling and tenderness, hand-cut to showcase its natural beauty. Grilled over an open flame, the delicate layers of fat melt into the meat, creating a buttery texture and deep, beef-forward flavor
items.simplified_description: Prime ribeye cap, grilled to enhance its rich flavor and tenderness

items.name: Oli Jumulleog
items.description: Tender duck slices marinated in a bold blend of Korean spices, garlic, and gochugaru for a deep, smoky heat. Stir-fried to lock in juiciness, each bite delivers a perfect harmony of savory, spicy, and slightly sweet flavors that linger on the palate
items.simplified_description: Marinated duck stir-fried with spicy Korean flavors
